## Checklist

- [ ] I have read **[ETHICAL.md](ETHICAL.md)** or **[ETHICAL_ja.md](ETHICAL_ja.md)** and this contribution aligns with those standards.
- [ ] I have read and agree to **[CLA.md](CLA.md)** / **[CLA_ja.md](CLA_ja.md)** (version 1.0). *(First-time contributors: complete CLA assistant when the org enables it, or state agreement in the PR body if the bot is not yet configured.)*
- [ ] Every commit includes a **Developer Certificate of Origin** sign-off: `Signed-off-by: Name <email>` (use `git commit -s`).
